name: Mysterious Monolith: Existence
description: Reach Assistant qualification.
rewards: Ability to harness more energy from the monolith (+100 energy)

name: Mysterious Monolith: Architecture
description: Reach Associate qualification.
rewards: Ability to harness more energy from the monolith (+150 energy)

name: Mysterious Monolith: Symbology
description: Reach Professor qualification.
rewards: Ability to harness more energy from the monolith (+100 energy)

name: Philosophy
description: Purchase the energised meteorite shard.
rewards: Ability to combine a crystal mattock and Imcando mattock with a meteorite shard to create the mattock of time and space

name: Writings of the Walls: Kharid-et
description: Study strange writing on the east side of the maximum security area of the prison block of Kharid-et Dig Site while wearing the master archaeologist's outfit.

name: Writings of the Walls: Infernal Source
description: Study strange writing on the western wall in the first room of the Dungeon of Disorder in Infernal Source Dig Site while wearing the master archaeologist's outfit.

name: Writings of the Walls: Everlight
description: Study strange writing at the western end of an underground marble corridor, accessed by entering the door in the Acropolis of Everlight Dig Site while wearing the master archaeologist's outfit.

name: Writings of the Walls: Stormguard
description: Study strange writing on the eastern wall of the building in Research & Development north-west excavation site of Stormguard Citadel Dig Site while wearing the master archaeologist's outfit.

name: Writings of the Walls: Warforge
description: Study strange writing in the elevated north-western corner of Thalmund's Forge at Warforge Dig Site while wearing the master archaeologist's outfit.

name: Ikovian Tragedy
description: Study the Ikovian temple by clicking either the northern or southern archway in the Temple of Ikov excavation site.

name: Deer-ly Departed
description: Study the memorial megalith in the Keshik memorial excavation site.

name: The Aetherium Giant
description: Study the war golem arm in the middle of the south-western islands of Stormguard Citadel Dig Site while in flight with wingsuit v2 or higher.

name: Night and Day
description: Study the oven in the Culinarum excavation site at the Kharid-et Dig Site.

name: Shadow Play
description: Study the war table inside the praetorium.

name: Lockdown
description: Study the central vault at the Kharid-et Dig Site during The Vault of Shadows mystery.

name: Nom-Nom-Nom-Nom
description: Partially complete Tomes of the Warlock quest.

name: The Hidden Chamber
description: Study the cathedral bookcase in the northwestern corner of the cathedral in Senntisten.

name: Prime Real Estate
description: Study the market stall outside of the colosseum gateway in Senntisten.

name: Complete the Pattern, Solve the Puzzle
description: Study the table in a small house at the far south end of the Nodon Front.

name: Are You Not Entertained?
description: Study the Gladiator Bones in the middle of the Colosseum in Senntisten.

name: Crossing that Bridge
description: Study the scaffolding north of intern Jimmy after obtaining the Inquisitior's Memoirs (page 5).
